descricao: Template para videos mais longos com multiplas cenas conectadas

cenas.descricao: Abertura - Vista aerea da cidade ao amanhecer
cenas.dalle_prompt: Aerial view of a modern city at dawn, golden sunlight illuminating skyscrapers, morning mist between buildings, cinematic wide angle, photorealistic, 4K quality
cenas.grok_movement: Slow aerial descent from high above the city, gradually revealing street level details, smooth cinematic motion

cenas.descricao: Transicao - Zoom nas ruas da cidade
cenas.grok_movement: Continue descending, camera tilts down focusing on busy morning streets, people starting their day

cenas.dalle_prompt: Busy city street at morning rush hour, people walking to work, coffee shops opening, warm morning light, urban lifestyle, street photography style, high detail
cenas.grok_movement: Steady cam moving forward through the crowd, following the flow of people, dynamic urban energy
Camera stops and pans right towards a cozy coffee shop entrance, focusing on the welcoming atmosphere

cenas.dalle_prompt: Cozy coffee shop interior, warm lighting, wooden furniture, barista preparing coffee, customers reading books, plants by the window, inviting atmosphere, lifestyle photography
cenas.grok_movement: Slow dolly forward into the cafe, camera weaving between tables, capturing intimate morning moments

cenas.descricao: Detalhe - Xicara de cafe sendo preparada
cenas.grok_movement: Smooth zoom focusing on coffee being poured, close-up shot with shallow depth of field, steam rising

cenas.dalle_prompt: City park in morning light, joggers on paths, dog walkers, green trees, fountain in center, peaceful urban oasis, natural lighting, wide landscape shot
cenas.grok_movement: Wide establishing shot of the park, slow pan from left to right showing the full scope of green space

cenas.descricao: Caminho no parque - Pessoas se exercitando
cenas.grok_movement: Camera moves along the jogging path, following runners and cyclists, capturing active morning lifestyle

cenas.dalle_prompt: Serene park lake with perfect reflections of trees and sky, ducks swimming peacefully, morning sunlight creating golden ripples, tranquil nature scene, cinematic composition
cenas.grok_movement: Slow circular orbit around the lake, revealing different perspectives and reflections, peaceful and meditative

cenas.descricao: Encerramento - Nascer do sol sobre a agua
cenas.grok_movement: Camera rises slowly above the lake, revealing the full sunrise over the water, fade to bright golden light as ending

configuracoes.notas: Cada cena gera aproximadamente 5-10 segundos de video. Com 10 cenas, voce tera entre 50 segundos e 1:40 minutos. Para videos mais longos, adicione mais cenas seguindo este modelo.
